players.name: Mohamed El Shenawy
players.full_name: Mohamed El-Sayed Mohamed El-Shenawy Gomaa; محمد الشناوي
players.bio:
Mohamed El-Sayed Mohamed El-Shenawy Gomaa (Arabic: محمد السيد محمد الشناوي جمعة; born 18 December 1988) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly, which he captains, and the Egypt national team.

He began his career as a youth player with Al Ahly but was released in 2009, joining Tala'ea El Gaish. He spent time on loan with Haras El-Hodoud before joining Petrojet in 2013. He returned to Al Ahly in July 2016 and then displaced Sher

players.name: Yasser Ibrahim
players.full_name: Yasser Ibrahim Ahmed El Hanafi; يَاسِر إبرَاهِيْم أَحمَد الْحَنَفِي
players.bio: Yasser Ibrahim Ahmed El Hanafi (Arabic: يَاسِر إبرَاهِيْم أَحمَد الْحَنَفِي; born 10 February 1993) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly and the Egypt national team.

players.name: Mohamed Hany
players.full_name: Mohamed Hany Gamal El-Demerdash; محمد هاني الدمرداش
players.bio: Mohamed Hany Gamal El-Demerdash (Arabic: محمد هاني جمال الدمرداش; born 2 February 1996) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly and the Egypt national team.

players.name: Hossam Abdelmaguid
players.full_name: Hossam Abdelmaguid Abdelsalam, حسام عبد المجيد عبد السلام;
players.bio: Hossam Abdelmaguid Abdelsalam (Arabic: حسام عبد المجيد عبد السلام; born 30 April 2001) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Egyptian Premier League club Zamalek and the Egypt national team.

players.name: Ramy Rabia
players.full_name: Ramy Hisham Abdel Aziz Mostafa Rabia; رامى ربيعة
players.bio:
Ramy Hisham Abdel Aziz Mostafa Rabia (Arabic: رامي هشام عبد العزيز مصطفى ربيعة; born 20 May 1993) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for UAE Pro League club Al Ain and the Egypt national football team.

He began his career with Al Ahly, making his professional debut at the age of seventeen in 2010. Regarded as one of the brightest prospects in Egyptian football, he attracted attention from several clubs before joining Portuguese side Sporting CP in 2014 for a fee

players.name: Mohamed Abdelmonem
players.full_name: Mohamed Abdelmonem El-Sayed Mohamed Ahmed; محمد عبد المنعم
players.bio: Mohamed Abdelmonem El-Sayed Mohamed Ahmed (Arabic: مُحَمَّد عَبد الْمُنْعِم السَّيِّد مُحَمَّد أَحمَد; born 1 February 1999) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Ligue 1 club Nice and the Egypt national team.

players.name: Trézéguet
players.full_name: Mahmoud Ahmed Ibrahim Hassan; محمود حسن
players.bio:
Mahmoud Ahmed Ibrahim Hassan (born 1 October 1994), commonly known as Trézéguet, is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly and the Egypt national team. His nickname is taken from the French former footballer David Trezeguet, after his former youth coach noticed similarities of playing style and appearance between the pair.

He began his career with Al Ahly, breaking into the first team at the age of 18 and helping them win the 2012 C
players.kit: Nike Mercurial Vapor XIII Elite FG

players.name: Emam Ashour
players.full_name: Emam Ashour Metwally Abdelghany; إمام عاشور
players.bio: Emam Ashour Metwally Abdelghany (Arabic: إمام عاشور متولي عبدالغني الاسد; born 20 February 1998) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly and the Egypt national football team.

players.name: Hamza Abdelkarim
players.full_name: Hamza Mohamed Abdelkarim Selim, حمزة عبدالكريم;
players.bio: Hamza Mohamed Abdelkarim Selim (Arabic: حمزة عبدالكريم; born 1 January 2008) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Segunda Federación club Barcelona Atlètic, on loan from Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly.

players.name: Mohamed Salah
players.full_name: Mohamed Salah Hamed Mahrous Ghaly; محمد صلاح حامد محروس غالى‎
players.bio:
Mohamed Salah Hamed Mahrous Ghaly (Arabic: محمد صلاح حامد محروس غالى‎, born 15 June 1992) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Premier League club Liverpool and the Egypt national team. Considered one of the best players in the world, he is known for his finishing, dribbling, and speed.

Salah started his senior career with Egyptian club El Mokawloon, departing shortly thereafter to join Swiss side Basel for an undisclosed fee. In Switzerland, his performances attr

players.name: Mostafa Ziko
players.full_name: Mostafa Mohamed Zaki Abdelraouf; مصطفي زيكو

players.name: Haissem Hassan
players.full_name: هيثم حسن
players.bio: Haissem Hassan (born 8 February 2002) is a professional footballer who plays as a forward for Spanish club Real Oviedo. Born in France, he plays for the Egypt national team.

players.name: Ahmed Fatouh
players.full_name: Ahmed Mohamed Abou El Fotouh Mohamed, أحمد محمد أبو الفتوح محمد;
players.bio:
Ahmed Mohamed Abou El Fotouh Mohamed (Arabic: أحمد محمد أبو الفتوح محمد; born 22 March 1998), simply known as Ahmed Fatouh (Arabic: أحمد فتوح), is an Egyptian footballer who plays for Egyptian Premier League side Zamalek and the Egypt national team as a left-back or left wing-back.

Fatouh featured in the 2021 Africa Cup of Nations Final against Senegal.

players.name: Hamdy Fathy
players.full_name: Hamdy Fathy Abdelhalim Abdelfattah; حمدي فتحى
players.bio: Hamdy Fathy Abdelhalim Abdelfattah (Arabic: حمدي فتحي عبد الحليم عبد الفتاح; born 29 September 1994) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Qatar Stars League club Al-Wakrah and the Egypt national team.

players.name: Karim Hafez
players.full_name: Karim Hafez Ramadan Seifeldin; كَرِيم حَافِظ رَمَضَان سَيْف الدِّين
players.bio: Karim Hafez Ramadan Seifeldin (Arabic: كَرِيم حَافِظ رَمَضَان سَيْف الدِّين; born 12 March 1996) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays for Egyptian Premier League club Pyramids and the Egypt national team as a left-back.

players.name: El Mahdy Soliman
players.full_name: El Mahdy Soliman, المهدي سليمان;
players.bio: El Mahdy Soliman (Arabic: المهدي سليمان; born 8 June 1987) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for the Egyptian Premier League side Zamalek SC.

players.name: Mohanad Lasheen
players.full_name: Mohanad Mostafa Ahmed Abdelmonem Lasheen; مهند مصطفى لاشين
players.bio: Mohanad Mostafa Ahmed Abdelmonem Lasheen (born 29 May 1996) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Egyptian Premier League club Pyramids and the Egypt national team.

players.name: Nabil Emad
players.full_name: Nabil Emad Aly Elmahdy; نبيل عماد علي المهدي
players.bio: Nabil Emad Aly Elmahdy (Arabic: نبيل عماد علي المهدي; born 6 April 1996) also known as Donga (Arabic: دونجا), is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Saudi Pro League club Al-Najma and the Egypt national team.

players.name: Marwan Attia
players.full_name: Marwan Attia Fahim Ghallab; مروان عطية
players.bio:
Marwan Attia Fahim Ghallab (Arabic: مروان عطية فاهم غلاب; born 1 August 1998) is an Egyptian footballer who plays as a midfielder for Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly and the Egypt national team.

He signed with Al Ahly SC in the middle of the 2022–23 season amid interest from arch-rivals Zamalek SC on a four-and-a-half-year contract.

He was called up for the first time to the Egyptian national team in August 2022, before making his first appearance on 24 March 2023.

players.name: Ibrahim Adel
players.full_name: Ibrahim Adel Ali Mohamed Hassan, إِبْرَاهِيم عَادِل عَلِيّ مُحَمَّد حَسَن;
players.bio: Ibrahim Adel Ali Mohamed Hassan (Arabic: إِبْرَاهِيم عَادِل عَلِيّ مُحَمَّد حَسَن; born 23 April 2001), is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays for Danish Superliga club FC Nordsjælland, on loan from UAE Pro League side Al Jazira as a winger and the Egypt national team.

players.name: Mahmoud Saber
players.full_name: Mahmoud Saber Abdelmohsen Hassan, مَحْمُود صَابِر عَبْد الْمُحْسِن حَسَن‎;
players.bio: Mahmoud Saber Abdelmohsen Hassan (Arabic: مَحْمُود صَابِر عَبْد الْمُحْسِن حَسَن‎; born 30 July 2001) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for ZED on loan from Pyramids and the Egypt national team.

players.name: Omar Marmoush
players.full_name: Omar Khaled Mohamed Abd Elsala Marmoush; مَر خَالِد مُحَمَّد مَرمُوش
players.bio: Omar Khaled Mohamed Abd Elsala Marmoush (born 7 February 1999) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Premier League club Manchester City and the Egypt national team.

players.name: Mostafa Shobeir
players.full_name: Mostafa Ahmed Abdelaziz Mohamed Shobeir; مصطفي أحمد شوبير
players.bio:
Mostafa Ahmed Abdelaziz Mohamed Shobeir (Arabic: مصطفي أحمد عبد العزيز محمد شوبير; born 17 March 2000) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Egyptian club Al Ahly SC and the Egypt national team.

On 2 December 2025, Shobeir was called up to the Egypt squad for the 2025 Africa Cup of Nations.

Shobeir is the son of former Egyptian national team goalkeeper Ahmed Shobair.

players.name: Tarek Alaa
players.full_name: Tarek Alaa El Gebaly, طارق علاء الجبالي
players.bio: Tarek Alaa (Arabic: طَارِق عَلَاء; born c. 2003) is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Egyptian Premier League club Zamalek and the Egypt national team.

players.name: Zizo
players.full_name: Ahmed Mostafa Mohamed Sayed; أحمد سيد زيزو
players.bio:
Ahmed Mostafa Mohamed Sayed (Arabic: أحمد مصطفى محمد سيد; born 10 January 1996) commonly known as Zizo (Arabic: زيزو), is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Egyptian Premier League club Al Ahly and the Egypt national team.

Zizo made his Belgian Pro League debut at 29 March 2014 against Waasland-Beveren in a 0–2 away win in the 2013–14 season, he replaced Souleymane Diomandé after 50 minutes. He went onto make 72 appearances and score 49 goals in his first four seaso

players.name: Mohamed Alaa
players.full_name: محمد علاء
players.bio:
Mohamed Alaa is a 26-year-old Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for the Egyptian Premier League club El Gouna FC
Alaa completed a transfer to El Gouna FC in July 2024 from Canal SC. He has established himself as a primary goalkeeper for the squad, earning a strong reputation for his reflexes and handling. Fans and media often refer to him by his nickname, "The Octopus".
